positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala illustration featuring stylized mystical wildlife and interwoven bioluminescent flora. The central subject is a graceful stag head intertwined with vibrant, swirling cosmic vines and exaggerated, geometric lotus petals. Use a palette of deep indigo, neon cyan, amethyst purple, and bright gold accents. The style must be a combination of intricate Art Nouveau line work and clean, modern graphic vector art, ensuring strong, distinct silhouettes and negative space. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a chest print, with dynamic linework and maximum contrast against a solid background. Hyper-detailed, clean lines, stencil print quality.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, ugly, grainy, bokeh, bokeh effect, monochrome
